title: Xilinx's RAMB36 inference
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

[minitest_bram_36.zip](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/4298887/minitest_bram_36.zip)

Run `make bram.edif` to call yosys
Run `make bram_vivado.bit` to call vivado

## Expected behavior

Yosys should infere a RAMB36 TDP as Vivado does.

## Actual behavior

Yosys fails to infer the BRAM
```
2.52. Printing statistics.

=== bram ===

   Number of wires:                 26
   Number of wire bits:            364
   Number of public wires:          12
   Number of public wire bits:     150  
   Number of memories:               0
   Number of memory bits:            0
   Number of processes:              0
   Number of cells:                153
     $mem                            1
     IBUF                           86
     LUT2                            2
     OBUF                           64

   Estimated number of LCs:          1
```
code_blocks:
2.52. Printing statistics.

=== bram ===

   Number of wires:                 26
   Number of wire bits:            364
   Number of public wires:          12
   Number of public wire bits:     150  
   Number of memories:               0
   Number of memory bits:            0
   Number of processes:              0
   Number of cells:                153
     $mem                            1
     IBUF                           86
     LUT2                            2
     OBUF                           64

   Estimated number of LCs:          1
